---
title: "Core Competencies Glossary"
---

All Core Competencies can be assigned into one of four categories: {{< fa heart >}} Values, {{< fa wand-magic-sparkles >}} Skills, {{< fa hand-holding-heart >}} Stewardship, and {{< fa square-poll-vertical >}} Results. Click the relevant tab below for more details on the Core Competencies within each category.

### {{< fa heart >}} Values



### {{< fa wand-magic-sparkles >}} Skills



### {{< fa hand-holding-heart >}} Stewardship



### {{< fa square-poll-vertical >}} Results
